description: Set the number of threads for calculations and plotting.

keywords.name: automatic
keywords.description: The number of threads reported by the operating system is used. Note that if hyper-threading is active, this can be twice the actual number of processors and cores available. This setting is stored across runs — if modified the given setting will be used the next time the code is launched.
